deathnote: Near: If you can't win the game, if you can't solve the puzzle, then you're just a loser.
L: There is no heaven or hell. No matter what you do while you're alive, everybody goes to the same place once you die.
Light: This world is rotten, and those who are making it rot deserve to die.
naruto: Naruto: If you don't like your destiny, don't accept it. Instead, have the courage to change it.
Itachi: People's lives don't end when they die. It ends when they lose faith.
Jiraiya: A person grows up when he's able to overcome hardships.
Kakashi: Those who break the rules are scum, but those who abandon their friends are worse than scum.
Rock Lee: A genius of hard work.
one_piece: Luffy: I don't want to conquer anything. I just think the guy with the most freedom is the Pirate King!
Robin: I want to live! Take me to the sea with you!
Sanji: A real man forgives a woman for her lies.
dragon_ball: Goku: Power comes in response to a need, not a desire. You have to create that need.
Vegeta: Every time I reach a new level of strength, a greater challenge appears.
Piccolo: There's nothing wrong with letting people help you.
Vegeta: Strength is the only thing that matters in this world.
Goku: I am a Saiyan who was raised on Planet Earth!
demon_slayer: Tanjiro: No matter how many people you may lose, you have no choice but to go on living.
Rengoku: Set your heart ablaze. Go beyond your limits!
Tanjiro: All I can do is work hard! That's the story of my life!
Zenitsu: I hate myself more than anyone. I always think I have to get my act together.
Giyu: Don't ever give others a reason to kill you.
attack_on_titan: Eren: If you win, you live. If you lose, you die. If you don't fight, you can't win!
Mikasa: This world is cruel, but also very beautiful.
Levi: The only thing we're allowed to do is believe that we won't regret the choice we made.
Armin: Someone who can't sacrifice anything, can never change anything.
Erwin: If you begin to regret, you'll dull your future decisions.
jujutsu_kaisen: Gojo: Throughout Heaven and Earth, I alone am the honored one.
Itadori: I'm going to help people. Even if it kills me.
Nanami: I have no intention of fulfilling the role of a teacher.
Gojo: Don't worry. I'm the strongest.
Todo: What kind of woman is your type?
my_hero_academia: All Might: It's fine now. Why? Because I am here!
Deku: Sometimes I do feel like I'm a failure. But even so, I'm not gonna give up.
All Might: The most inflated egos are often the most fragile.
solo_leveling: Sung Jin-Woo: I alone level up.
Sung Jin-Woo: I'm not the same person I was yesterday.
Sung Jin-Woo: The weak have no say. That's just how the world works.
Sung Jin-Woo: I'll get stronger. No matter what it takes.
